summary: Created Marmot adapter layer: NdkNetworkAdapter (NostrNetworkInterface impl), IdbGroupStateBackend + IdbKeyPackageBackend (IndexedDB via idb-keyval), signerAdapter (applesauce-core EventSigner from private key hex), MarmotContext (createGroup, inviteByNpub, leaveGroup, publishScoreUpdate). Resolved SWC crash with custom webpack loader. 65/65 tests pass, build succeeds.
